name: hemmabo-mcp-server
description: Booking infrastructure for vacation rentals. Like Mirai for hotels — own domain, Stripe direct, 0% commission. 9 production tools covering complete booking lifecycle. Live at villaåkerlyckan.se.

SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.description: Supabase service role key (secret, full database access)

STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.description: Stripe secret key for payment processing (required for checkout/cancel/reschedule)
